title: Depression Sky Island
body:
This modpack adds the Depression module, designed to add the original Empty Island difficulty.
The Integration Pack makes a small number of changes to the recipes, just to make some things possible that were impossible in Empty Island.
This modpack uses the original Empty Island setting in its entirety.
For customised versions, please contact me on github or discord.
Modpack support varies with changes to the depression module.

本modpack添加了抑郁症模组，旨在添加原版空岛难度。
整合包对配方做了少量的修改，只为让一些在空岛中不可能的事情变得可能。
本modpack完全使用原本空岛设定。
如想定制版本，请于github或discord联系我。
modpack支持情况随抑郁症模组的变动而变动。
